summary: 2 film announcements, 1 TV announcement across 5 trades.

film.announcement: Sequel to 'Young Washington' greenlit following the original film's $20M+ opening record for Angel Studios' live-action releases.

film.title: Basic Instinct Reboot
film.announcement: Writer Joe Eszterhas provides update on the 'Basic Instinct' reboot with Catherine Tramell returning to the project.

tv.title: Murciélago
tv.announcement: Manga adaptation greenlit for 2027 TV anime series on HIDIVE.
